name: Wiliwilinui Ridge
tagline: The Ko'olau's best-kept ridge secret — pass through a gated community into native forest with panoramic views.
parking: Limited spots — check in with security at the Waialae Iki gate on Okoa St
hours: Daylight hours only; security gate staffed roughly 7am–6pm
bestTime: Early morning for clear summit views (clouds roll in by midday)
talkStory: Must check in with security at the Waialae Iki neighborhood gate on Okoa St. About 4.5 miles round trip with 1,500 ft elevation gain — moderate to challenging. The Ko'olau ridge summit views of both windward and leeward Oahu are among the best on the island. Trail can be muddy and slippery — wear proper hiking shoes. Bring layers for the windy, cooler summit.
